commands.name: list
commands.description: retrieves the list of Swagger document names from a startup assembly

options.name: --output
options.description: relative path where the document names will be output, defaults to stdout

commands.name: tofile
commands.description: retrieves Swagger from a startup assembly, and writes to file

options.name: --output
options.description: relative path where the Swagger will be output, defaults to stdout

options.name: --host
options.description: a specific host to include in the Swagger output

options.name: --basepath
options.description: a specific basePath to include in the Swagger output

options.name: --openapiversion
options.description: output Swagger in the specified version, defaults to 3.0

options.name: --yaml
options.description: exports swagger in a yaml format
